estimation_notes.pancreatic_cancer: Model-estimated age-specific incidence for pancreatic cancer in China. Based on NCCR 2011 ASIRW (male 4.95, female 3.55 per 100,000) and age-distribution curves from Chinese cancer registry literature (peak ~75-80 years, negligible before age 40). Source ID for these priors: 'model_estimated_nccr2011'.

source_notes.thyroid_cancer: Age-sex specific incidence for thyroid cancer in China from IARC Global Cancer Observatory, Cancer Today, GLOBOCAN 2022 v1.1 / 2022ps API. Country code 156, cancer code 32 (C73). Source ID for these priors: 'globocan_2022_gco_api'.
